# Annotated References

## Platform documentation

### TikTok — How TikTok recommends content

URL: https://support.tiktok.com/en/using-tiktok/exploring-videos/how-tiktok-recommends-content

Use for:

```text
user interactions
likes/shares/comments
watching in full
skipping
sounds/hashtags/views
device/language/location/time signals
```

### YouTube Help — Shorts analytics

URL: https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/12942217?co=YOUTUBE._YTVideoType%3Dshorts&hl=en

Use for:

```text
Shown in feed
How many chose to view
viewed versus swiped away
Shorts analytics targets
```

### Meta — How AI influences Facebook and Instagram

URL: https://about.fb.com/news/2023/06/how-ai-ranks-content-on-facebook-and-instagram/

Use for:

```text
many predictions combined
predicted sharing
content value estimation
```

### Instagram Creators — Recommendations and originality

URL: https://creators.instagram.com/blog/recommendations-and-originality

Use for:

```text
originality
recommendation updates
smaller creators
new audience discovery
```

## Recommender systems

### Deep Neural Networks for YouTube Recommendations

URL: https://research.google.com/pubs/archive/45530.pdf

Use for:

```text
candidate generation + ranking
expected watch time objective
ranking by score
live A/B testing importance
```

### Multi-Armed Bandits with Abandonment

URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.13566

Use for:

```text
exploration/exploitation
short-video recommendation analogy
abandonment-aware exploration
```

## Short-video engagement prediction

### SnapUGC / Delving Deep into Engagement Prediction of Short Videos

URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.00289

Use for:

```text
NAWP
ECR
multimodal short-video engagement prediction
real-world UGC short-video dataset
```

### Engagement Prediction with Large Multimodal Models

URL: https://arxiv.org/html/2508.02516v2

Use for:

```text
audio-visual-language engagement prediction
large multimodal model direction
```

## TRIBE

### TRIBE v2 Hugging Face

URL: https://huggingface.co/facebook/tribev2

fMRI response prediction
video/audio/text multimodal brain encoding
average-subject output
model architecture details
license check
```

official TRIBE release context
brain-response foundation model framing
```
